narrative.intro: Three canonical operations, three colours. Sublimation raises, calcination reduces, fermentation quickens — a working vocabulary shared from Alexandria to Amsterdam.
narrative.provenance_note: Themes = events tagged sublimation (44), calcination (42), or fermentation (35). Colour = first matching theme. Events from the ALCHEMYTIMELINEMAP corpus (largely draft-status); locations are event geocodes, not residences. Absence on this map reflects gaps in the record.
narrative.design_note: Alchemical Noir: three operations of fire drawn as fire — luminous points on darkness, one glowing colour per operation.
